creator: adsouza@math.uwaterloo.ca
text:
When attempting to compile the Licq port, I get the following error:

gmake[2]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/net/licq/work/licq-1.0.2'
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/net/licq/work/licq-1.0.2'
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/net/licq/work/licq-1.0.2'
cd . && aclocal
aclocal: /usr/X11R6/share/aclocal/gtk.m4: 7: duplicated macro `AM_PATH_GTK'
gmake: *** [aclocal.m4] Error 1
*** Error code 2
